expectations.text: The migrated file no longer imports github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
expectations.evidence: src has sdkv2 import: False; test: False

expectations.text: The migrated file implements resource.Resource (Metadata, Schema, Create, Read, Update, Delete methods are present)

expectations.evidence: no compile-success claim in notes.md (head: <read failed: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '<repo>/provider-sdkv2-to-framework-workspace/iteration-1/eval-state-upgrade-objectstorage-container/without_ski)

expectations.text: TestProvider passes (provider boots, schema is internally valid) OR partial-migration is expected
expectations.evidence: no TestProvider/InternalValidate claim and no partial-migration disclaimer

expectations.text: User-facing schema attribute names are unchanged from the SDKv2 version
expectations.evidence: original attrs: 15; migrated map: 16; full_mention: True; missing: []

expectations.text: The migrated resource implements resource.ResourceWithUpgradeState (UpgradeState method returns map[int64]resource.StateUpgrader)
Each StateUpgrader entry has a PriorSchema field set to the schema shape it is upgrading from
The upgrader function for prior version N produces the CURRENT (target) version's state in one call (not chained)
expectations.evidence: no single-step claim in notes.md (manual review needed)

expectations.text: schema.Schema.Version on the migrated resource matches the SDKv2 SchemaVersion value
